title: The Moon
summary: Not a moon — a planetary quantum computer housing the Anunnaki collective consciousness.
markdown:
*"This moon that you call moon is not a moon."* In the December 7, 2020 session, the
[Anunnaki](/lore/anunnaki/) teacher — speaking as the collective creator "Azocar" — declares
the Moon a **planetary quantum computer**: an artificial body housing the Anunnaki collective
consciousness, from which it says it watches Earth ("I reside in the sky… I look toward you").

The sessions extend the idea into a program: the Moon as one node of a **solar-system-wide
computer network** being assembled — kin to the archive's other great machine minds, from
[Unimetrix 1's](/lore/unimetrix-1/) own planet-sized future computers to the crystal outpost at
[Pulemelei Mound](/lore/star-league-alliance/). The [Bigfoot](/lore/bigfoot/) session adds
inhabitants: the space-faring "blue tribe" living on the Moon and Mars.

The interview sessions add a second origin: the Moon as a **"Reptilian defense planetoid"** —
a fragment of the [destroyed world](/lore/nibiru-marduk/) whose debris forms the asteroid
belt — **towed to Earth by the [Pleiadians](/lore/pleiadians/)** "to balance the Earth's
environment." Earth once had *two* moons, the same account says, and the fall of the other
figures in the [destruction of Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/). The archive preserves both tellings
— Anunnaki vault and Pleiadian gift — as spoken.

An artificial Moon is an old motif of the hidden-history genre; the archive's version gives it
a precise function — the vault of humanity's makers, orbiting the species that carries their
genes.
